company.segment_en: The owner of the AI build-out's binding constraint — ~50-60% of HBM (EST), sold out through 2026, and the ONLY Tier-V name that is TSMC's complement rather than TSMC's customer
company.segment_zh: AI 建置綁定約束的擁有者 — 約 50-60% 的 HBM 市占（估計），2026 全年售罄，也是 Tier V 七家中唯一「台積電的互補者、而非台積電的客戶」
company.blurb_en: Four pillars on the memory company the platform's own findings converge on: how SK hynix raises realized compute price (HBM3E→HBM4 generational ASP · sold-out LTA allocation · custom base dies · conventional-DRAM spillover) with NAND honestly weak and Samsung/Micron/CXMT pushing back · what to watch it with · its ~$25B HBM run-rate (DERIVED estimate) inside disclosed total revenue · and the twist: memory dies never touch a TSMC fab, yet TSMC CoWoS and SK HBM gate each other — 互補而非客戶.
company.blurb_zh: 對「平台自身結論所收斂的那家記憶體公司」的四支柱：SK海力士怎麼提高已實現算力售價（HBM3E→HBM4 世代 ASP · 售罄的 LTA 配額 · 客製 base die · 傳統 DRAM 外溢），NAND 誠實地弱、三星/美光/CXMT 反推 · 用什麼觀察 · 其 ~$25B HBM 年化（推導估計）藏在已揭露總營收內 · 以及反轉：記憶體晶粒從不進台積電晶圓廠，但台積電 CoWoS 與 SK HBM 互相把關 — 互補而非客戶。

thesis_en: SK hynix owns the thing everyone else on this board queues for: /bottleneck names HBM supply the binding constraint of deliverable compute (1.72M B200-eq accelerators/qtr, 對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02), and SK hynix holds ~50-60% of HBM (EST). Realized price rises through the HBM3E 12-hi → HBM4 generational ASP ladder (HBM4 premium ~50-60%, press EST), capacity sold out through 2026 under year-ahead LTAs, custom base-die co-design, and conventional-DRAM tightening as AI absorbs wafers. Honest drags: NAND is a weak lever, and Samsung/Micron catch-up plus CXMT (the /geo China-DRAM thread) is structural — memory pricing power is cyclical, so the score sits at 71.4, below NVDA 75.0 / AVGO 73.8 (full-stack price-setters) and above AMD 68.3. The TSMC twist: SK hynix is a COMPLEMENT, not a customer — its stacks are consumed on TSMC CoWoS interposers, the two gate each other, and only the HBM4 base die makes it a TSMC logic customer at all. Its capacity ramp RELIEVES the platform's binding constraint.
thesis_zh: SK海力士擁有這個平台上其他所有人都在排隊等的東西：/bottleneck 判定 HBM 供給是可交付算力的綁定約束（每季 172 萬顆 B200 當量加速器，對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02），而 SK海力士握有約 50-60% 的 HBM（估計）。已實現價格靠 HBM3E 12層 → HBM4 的世代 ASP 階梯（HBM4 溢價約 50-60%，媒體估計）、2026 全年在一年期 LTA 下售罄的產能、客製 base die 共同設計、以及 AI 吸走晶圓後傳統 DRAM 的緊縮外溢推升。誠實的拖累：NAND 是弱槓桿，三星/美光追趕加上 CXMT（/geo 的中國 DRAM 線）是結構性的 — 記憶體定價權有循環性，因此分數 71.4，低於 NVDA 75.0／AVGO 73.8（全堆疊定價者）、高於 AMD 68.3。台積電反轉：SK海力士是互補者、不是客戶 — 它的堆疊在台積電 CoWoS 中介層上被消耗，兩者互相把關，只有 HBM4 base die 讓它勉強成為台積電邏輯客戶。它的產能爬坡「紓解」的正是平台的綁定約束。
pricing_engine_note_en: the HBM3E→HBM4 generational ASP ladder plus sold-out, LTA-locked allocation are doing the work — the constraint's owner prices the queue rather than chasing it, though memory cyclicality and Samsung/Micron/CXMT catch-up cap how far
pricing_engine_note_zh: HBM3E→HBM4 世代 ASP 階梯加上售罄、LTA 鎖定的配額在推動 — 約束的擁有者替排隊的人定價、而非追價，但記憶體循環性與三星/美光/CXMT 追趕限制其上限

pricing_levers.name_zh: HBM 世代 ASP 階梯（HBM3E 12層 → HBM4）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Each HBM generation resets price far above the one it replaces: HBM3E 8-hi → 12-hi (36GB) stepped ASP up, and HBM4 (2,048-bit I/O, 12-hi first, mass-production readiness completed Sep 2025) is press-reported to carry a ~50-60% premium over HBM3E (EST). Because every next-gen accelerator (Rubin, MI400) REQUIRES the next HBM generation, the mix forcibly migrates to the highest-ASP part — realized $/GB rises even as commodity DRAM $/GB deflates long-run.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 每一代 HBM 都把價格重置到遠高於上一代：HBM3E 8層 → 12層（36GB）已把 ASP 推上一階，HBM4（2,048-bit I/O、12層先行、2025 年 9 月完成量產準備）據媒體報導對 HBM3E 有約 50-60% 溢價（估計）。因為每一代新加速器（Rubin、MI400）都「必須」用下一代 HBM，產品組合被迫遷移到最高 ASP 的產品 — 即使商品 DRAM 每 GB 長期通縮，已實現 $/GB 仍上升。
pricing_levers.observability_en: HBM4 vs HBM3E price-premium estimates (TrendForce-class), DRAM revenue ÷ bit shipments (blended ASP) in quarterly results, HBM share-of-DRAM-revenue commentary.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: HBM4 vs HBM3E 溢價估計（TrendForce 級）、季報 DRAM 營收 ÷ 位元出貨（混合 ASP）、HBM 占 DRAM 營收比例的法說評論。
pricing_levers.source_en: SK hynix earnings; TrendForce HBM pricing research
pricing_levers.source_zh: SK海力士法說；TrendForce HBM 價格研究

pricing_levers.name_en: Sold-out allocation power (year-ahead LTAs, 2026 capacity gone)
pricing_levers.name_zh: 售罄的配額權力（一年期 LTA，2026 產能已清空）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: Management disclosed 2026 HBM capacity is effectively SOLD OUT via year-ahead long-term agreements negotiated with each customer — with prepayment/commitment structures press-reported for anchor buyers (T3). When the constraint's owner allocates rather than bids, price is set at negotiation, not eroded through the year — the memory version of NVIDIA's scarcity premium, and the strongest hard-disclosed lever.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 管理層揭露 2026 年 HBM 產能已透過與各客戶逐一議定的一年期長約實質售罄 — 錨定買家的預付/承諾結構有媒體報導（T3）。當約束的擁有者用「分配」而非「競價」出貨，價格在議約時就定好、不會在年中被侵蝕 — 這是 NVIDIA 稀缺溢價的記憶體版本，也是揭露基礎最硬的槓桿。
pricing_levers.observability_en: Sold-out language on earnings calls, LTA/prepayment disclosures and press reports, HBM capex guidance (M15X ramp), customer inventory-commitment lines in NVIDIA/AMD filings.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 法說會的「售罄」措辭、LTA／預付揭露與報導、HBM capex 指引（M15X 爬坡）、NVIDIA/AMD 財報中的客戶存貨承諾項。

pricing_levers.name_en: Custom / base-die differentiation (HBM4 base die → logic process)
pricing_levers.name_zh: 客製／base die 差異化（HBM4 base die → 邏輯製程）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: From HBM4 the base (logic) die moves to a foundry logic process — SK hynix partnered with TSMC (2024 MOU) to build it, and custom-HBM programs co-design that die with the accelerator vendor (controller/PHY functions pulled in). Customization converts a commodity stack into a socketed, co-engineered part: switching costs rise, second-sourcing gets harder, and value capture per stack goes up — the same 'custom silicon' economics Broadcom runs, applied to memory.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 從 HBM4 起，base（邏輯）die 移到晶圓代工邏輯製程 — SK海力士與台積電合作（2024 MOU）生產，而客製 HBM 專案更與加速器廠商共同設計該晶粒（把控制器/PHY 功能拉進來）。客製化把商品化的堆疊變成有插槽、共同工程的零件：轉換成本上升、第二供應商更難、每個堆疊的價值捕獲提高 — 等於把博通的「客製矽」經濟學搬進記憶體。
pricing_levers.observability_en: TSMC-SK hynix base-die partnership milestones, custom-HBM design-win announcements, base-die node attribution in teardowns (TechInsights).
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 台積電-SK海力士 base die 合作里程碑、客製 HBM 設計勝出公告、拆解報告中的 base die 節點歸因（TechInsights）。
pricing_levers.source_en: SK hynix-TSMC partnership announcement; trade press
pricing_levers.source_zh: SK海力士-台積電合作公告；產業媒體

pricing_levers.name_en: Conventional-DRAM tightening spillover (AI absorbs the wafers)
pricing_levers.name_zh: 傳統 DRAM 緊縮外溢（AI 吸走晶圓）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: HBM consumes ~3x the wafer area per bit of standard DRAM, so every HBM ramp removes conventional supply. With AI servers also pulling DDR5/MRDIMM, server-DRAM contract prices surged through late 2025 into 2026 (TrendForce-class indices) — a memory supercycle where the SAME fabs earn more on both the AI product and the starved commodity one. This lever is cyclical: it mean-reverts when capex catches up.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: HBM 每位元耗掉約 3 倍於標準 DRAM 的晶圓面積，因此每次 HBM 爬坡都在抽走傳統供給。加上 AI 伺服器同步拉動 DDR5/MRDIMM，伺服器 DRAM 合約價自 2025 年末漲進 2026（TrendForce 級指數）— 一場記憶體超級循環：同一批晶圓廠在 AI 產品與被抽乾的商品產品上同時多賺。此槓桿有循環性：capex 追上時會均值回歸。
pricing_levers.observability_en: DRAM contract & spot price indices (TrendForce/DRAMeXchange), server-DDR5 contract-price QoQ moves, DRAM revenue mix in quarterly results.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: DRAM 合約與現貨價指數（TrendForce/DRAMeXchange）、伺服器 DDR5 合約價季環比、季報中的 DRAM 營收結構。

pricing_levers.name_en: NAND / eSSD (Solidigm) — the honestly weak lever
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: AI data centers do lift high-capacity eSSD demand (QLC nearline via Solidigm), and NAND pricing recovered into 2026 — but NAND has more suppliers, weaker technology stratification and no HBM-style qualification moat. SK hynix takes price here more than it makes price. Kept in the stack for honesty: it dilutes, not drives, the blended realized-price story.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: AI 資料中心確實拉動大容量 eSSD 需求（Solidigm 的 QLC 近線儲存），NAND 價格也回升進 2026 — 但 NAND 供應商更多、技術分層更弱、沒有 HBM 式的驗證護城河。SK海力士在這裡接受價格多於制定價格。為誠實而保留在堆疊中：它稀釋、而非推動混合已實現價格的故事。
pricing_levers.observability_en: NAND contract price indices, eSSD share commentary, Solidigm results inside SK hynix consolidated filings.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: NAND 合約價指數、eSSD 市占評論、SK海力士合併報表內的 Solidigm 表現。
pricing_levers.source_en: TrendForce NAND research; SK hynix filings
pricing_levers.source_zh: TrendForce NAND 研究；SK海力士財報

pricing_levers.name_zh: 三星／美光／CXMT 追趕（負向槓桿）
pricing_levers.mechanism_en: The share that underwrites allocation power is under structural attack: Samsung is pushing HBM4 requalification to reclaim share, Micron is ramping HBM3E/HBM4 capacity, and CXMT — the China-DRAM catch-up thread /geo tracks (對齊 /geo 2026-07-02) — floods conventional DRAM first and aims at HBM next. Every point of share lost weakens the sold-out LTA lever; memory history says duopoly-plus-one premiums compress once a third qualified source ships at volume.
pricing_levers.mechanism_zh: 支撐配額權力的市占正受結構性攻擊：三星力推 HBM4 重新驗證以奪回市占，美光加速 HBM3E/HBM4 產能，而 CXMT — /geo 追蹤的中國 DRAM 追趕線（對齊 /geo 2026-07-02）— 先淹沒傳統 DRAM、下一步瞄準 HBM。每失一個百分點市占，售罄 LTA 槓桿就弱一分；記憶體歷史說明：一旦第三家通過驗證的供應商量產出貨，雙寡頭加一的溢價就會壓縮。
pricing_levers.observability_en: NVIDIA/AMD HBM qualification news per vendor, TrendForce HBM share estimates, CXMT capacity/node reports (/geo second-chain read), Samsung HBM4 milestones.
pricing_levers.observability_zh: 各家 HBM 通過 NVIDIA/AMD 驗證的新聞、TrendForce HBM 市占估計、CXMT 產能/節點報導（/geo 第二供應鏈判讀）、三星 HBM4 里程碑。

data_sources.what_en: Total & DRAM revenue, operating profit, HBM share-of-DRAM commentary — the hard floor for the benefit math; note: NO HBM segment line is reported.
data_sources.what_zh: 總營收與 DRAM 營收、營業利益、HBM 占 DRAM 比例的評論 — 利益推導的硬底；注意：並無 HBM 分部揭露項。

data_sources.name_en: SK hynix earnings calls & IR presentations
data_sources.name_zh: SK海力士法說會與投資人簡報
data_sources.what_en: Sold-out / LTA language, HBM4 ramp timing, capex framing, custom-HBM commentary — where the allocation-power lever is actually disclosed.
data_sources.what_zh: 「售罄」／LTA 措辭、HBM4 爬坡時程、capex 框架、客製 HBM 評論 — 配額權力槓桿真正被揭露的地方。

data_sources.name_en: DRAM contract & spot price indices (TrendForce / DRAMeXchange)
data_sources.name_zh: DRAM 合約與現貨價指數（TrendForce／DRAMeXchange）
data_sources.what_en: Server-DDR5 contract price moves and DRAM spot — the conventional-spillover lever's direct gauge, and /pricing's memory-premium input (對齊 /pricing 2026-07-02).
data_sources.what_zh: 伺服器 DDR5 合約價變動與 DRAM 現貨 — 傳統外溢槓桿的直接量規，也是 /pricing 記憶體溢價的輸入（對齊 /pricing 2026-07-02）。

data_sources.what_en: The ~50-60% SK hynix HBM share (EST) that underwrites allocation power — third-party estimates, no vendor reports HBM share.
data_sources.what_zh: 支撐配額權力的 SK海力士約 50-60% HBM 市占（估計）— 全為第三方估計，沒有任何一家廠商揭露 HBM 市占。

data_sources.name_zh: Capex 指引與晶圓廠建設（M15X、龍仁）
data_sources.what_en: HBM capacity ramp = the relief valve on the platform's binding constraint — M15X (Cheongju) and the Yongin cluster set how fast the HBM ceiling lifts (對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02).
data_sources.what_zh: HBM 產能爬坡＝平台綁定約束的洩壓閥 — M15X（清州）與龍仁聚落決定 HBM 天花板抬升多快（對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02）。

data_sources.what_en: Year-ahead HBM agreements, press-reported prepayments, and the purchase-commitment lines in NVIDIA/AMD filings — the demand side of the sold-out claim.
data_sources.what_zh: 一年期 HBM 協議、媒體報導的預付款、以及 NVIDIA/AMD 財報中的採購承諾項 — 「售罄」宣稱的需求端證據。

data_sources.what_en: Which vendor's HBM sits on which accelerator, stack height, and base-die node attribution — the ground truth behind share and custom-die claims.
data_sources.what_zh: 哪家的 HBM 落在哪顆加速器上、堆疊層數、base die 節點歸因 — 市占與客製晶粒宣稱背後的實物真相。

data_sources.what_en: Live KRX price — the market's real-time read on the memory supercycle. Sentiment context only, kept OUT of the pricing-power score.
data_sources.what_zh: KRX 即時股價 — 市場對記憶體超級循環的即時判讀。僅屬情緒情境，排除在定價權分數之外。

benefit_estimates.method_en: HBM revenue run-rate (derived from disclosed share math)
benefit_estimates.method_zh: HBM 營收年化（由揭露的比例推導）
benefit_estimates.basis_en: SK hynix reports NO HBM line. Derivation: total revenue run-rate ~$78B (annualized, KRW→USD) × DRAM ~80% of revenue ≈ $62B × HBM ~40% of DRAM revenue (management commentary) ≈ mid-$20Bs — carried at $25B, an ESTIMATE built from three disclosed/commented ratios. This is the revenue of the platform's binding constraint (對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02).
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: SK海力士沒有 HBM 揭露項。推導：總營收年化約 $78B（年化、韓元→美元）× DRAM 約占營收 80% ≈ $62B × HBM 約占 DRAM 營收 40%（管理層評論）≈ $25B 上下 — 取 $25B，為由三個揭露/評論比例組成的估計值。這正是平台綁定約束的營收（對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02）。

benefit_estimates.method_zh: 總營收年化（揭露值，年化韓元→美元）
benefit_estimates.basis_en: Annualizing the most recent disclosed quarter (~₩27T-class) at ~₩1,400/USD gives a ~$78B total run-rate — the disclosed anchor under the HBM derivation. Only the annualization and FX conversion are mechanical projections; the quarter itself is reported.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: 把最近一季揭露值（約 ₩27T 級）以約 ₩1,400/USD 年化，得總營收年化約 $78B — HBM 推導底下的揭露錨點。年化與匯率換算是機械性推算；季度本身為申報值。

benefit_estimates.method_zh: HBM 營業利益視角（利潤率估計）
benefit_estimates.basis_en: Analyst-class estimates put HBM operating margin near ~55-60% given negotiated LTA pricing — on a $25B run-rate that annualizes to ~$14B of operating income. Doubly estimated (revenue derived, margin estimated); a directional lens on how profitable owning the constraint is, not a reported figure.
benefit_estimates.basis_zh: 分析師級估計認為在議定 LTA 價格下 HBM 營業利益率約 55-60% — 以 $25B 年化計約 $14B 營業利益。雙重估計（營收為推導、利潤率為估計）；用來看「擁有約束有多賺」的方向性視角，非申報數字。

benefit_disclosure_en: SK hynix disclosures give total and DRAM revenue plus 'HBM ≈ 40% of DRAM revenue' commentary — but NO HBM segment line exists. The ~$25B headline is DERIVED from those disclosed ratios, an estimate cross-checked against the disclosed $78B total run-rate and an op-income lens.
benefit_disclosure_zh: SK海力士的揭露給出總營收、DRAM 營收與「HBM 約占 DRAM 營收 40%」的評論 — 但不存在 HBM 分部揭露項。~$25B 頭條是由這些揭露比例「推導」的估計值，並以揭露的 $78B 總營收年化與營益視角交叉驗證。

silicon_chain.accelerator_en: HBM4 (12-hi, base die on TSMC logic)
silicon_chain.accelerator_zh: HBM4（12層，base die 走台積電邏輯製程）
silicon_chain.role_en: Next-gen HBM for Rubin / MI400-class accelerators
silicon_chain.role_zh: 供 Rubin／MI400 級加速器的次世代 HBM
silicon_chain.node: 1c DRAM (EUV) + TSMC logic base die (node EST)
silicon_chain.note_en: The one thread where SK hynix IS a TSMC customer: from HBM4 the base die moves to a foundry logic process under the 2024 TSMC partnership (announced-class, T2). DRAM core dies stay in SK hynix's own fabs.
silicon_chain.note_zh: SK海力士唯一「成為台積電客戶」的一條線：自 HBM4 起，base die 依 2024 年與台積電的合作移到代工邏輯製程（公告級，T2）。DRAM 核心晶粒仍留在 SK海力士自家晶圓廠。

silicon_chain.note_en: The volume product of the constraint: lead supplier position on NVIDIA's newest accelerators. Never touches a TSMC fab — but every stack is consumed on a TSMC CoWoS interposer.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 約束的量產主力：在 NVIDIA 最新加速器上居主力供應商地位。從不進台積電晶圓廠 — 但每個堆疊都在台積電 CoWoS 中介層上被消耗。

silicon_chain.accelerator_zh: CoWoS 上的 HBM（GB200/GB300 · MI355X · TPU）
silicon_chain.role_en: Where the stacks are consumed — the complement link
silicon_chain.role_zh: 堆疊被消耗之處 — 互補環節
silicon_chain.note_en: The mutual gate: TSMC CoWoS capacity and SK hynix HBM supply cap EACH OTHER — /bottleneck finds HBM binding at 1.72M B200-eq accelerators/qtr (對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02), and /racks itemizes the stacks per rack. Neither side ships without the other.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 互相把關：台積電 CoWoS 產能與 SK海力士 HBM 供給互為上限 — /bottleneck 判定 HBM 綁定在每季 172 萬顆 B200 當量（對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02），/racks 則逐櫃列出堆疊用量。缺了任何一邊，另一邊都出不了貨。

silicon_chain.note_en: The generation that built the HBM lead — first to qualify at NVIDIA in volume, establishing the qualification moat the current allocation power rests on.
silicon_chain.note_zh: 建立 HBM 領先的一代 — 最早在 NVIDIA 大規模通過驗證，奠定了今日配額權力所依賴的驗證護城河。

silicon_chain.role_zh: AI 伺服器主記憶體＋外溢槓桿
silicon_chain.note_en: Every AI server carries TBs of host DRAM; HBM's wafer absorption tightens this market too. Also the first line CXMT attacks (/geo second-chain read, 對齊 2026-07-02).
silicon_chain.note_zh: 每台 AI 伺服器都載著數 TB 主記憶體；HBM 吸走晶圓也讓這個市場變緊。同時是 CXMT 最先進攻的產品線（/geo 第二供應鏈判讀，對齊 2026-07-02）。

silicon_chain.role_en: AI data-lake storage — the weak lever
silicon_chain.role_zh: AI 資料湖儲存 — 弱槓桿
silicon_chain.note_en: AI lifts high-capacity eSSD demand, but NAND lacks HBM's qualification moat — included for honesty; it dilutes the blended pricing story.
silicon_chain.note_zh: AI 拉動大容量 eSSD 需求，但 NAND 沒有 HBM 的驗證護城河 — 為誠實而列入；它稀釋混合定價故事。

silicon_summary_en: Memory dies never touch a TSMC fab — only the HBM4 base die (and the CoWoS interposers that consume every stack) are TSMC silicon, ~15% of AI-relevant value (EST). SK hynix is TSMC's complement, not its customer: unique among the seven lenses.
silicon_summary_zh: 記憶體晶粒從不進台積電晶圓廠 — 只有 HBM4 base die（與消耗每個堆疊的 CoWoS 中介層）是台積電的矽，約占 AI 相關價值 15%（估計）。SK海力士是台積電的互補者、不是客戶：七個鏡頭中獨一無二。
tsmc_read_en: SK hynix is a COMPLEMENT, not a customer — 互補而非客戶, unique among the seven lenses. Its DRAM stacks come from its own fabs (~15% TSMC exposure, EST, via the HBM4 base die on TSMC logic under the 2024 partnership). Yet no TSMC CoWoS interposer ships without HBM and no HBM stack earns without CoWoS: the two gate EACH OTHER, and /bottleneck names HBM the binding constraint on deliverable compute (1.72M B200-eq/qtr, 對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02). The Liebig insight for a foundry CEO: SK hynix's capacity ramp (M15X, Yongin) RELIEVES the platform's binding constraint — its capex is the one outside TSMC's walls that most directly monetizes TSMC's own CoWoS buildout, while CXMT (/geo) is the shared long-run threat.
tsmc_read_zh: SK海力士是互補者、不是客戶 — 互補而非客戶，七個鏡頭中獨一無二。其 DRAM 堆疊出自自家晶圓廠（台積電曝險約 15%，估計，來自 2024 年合作下走台積電邏輯製程的 HBM4 base die）。但沒有 HBM，台積電的 CoWoS 中介層出不了貨；沒有 CoWoS，HBM 堆疊也賺不到錢：兩者互相把關，而 /bottleneck 判定 HBM 是可交付算力的綁定約束（每季 172 萬顆 B200 當量，對齊 /bottleneck 2026-07-02）。給晶圓代工 CEO 的 Liebig 洞見：SK海力士的產能爬坡（M15X、龍仁）「紓解」的正是平台的綁定約束 — 它是台積電牆外最直接把台積電自家 CoWoS 擴建變現的 capex，而 CXMT（/geo）是雙方共同的長期威脅。

cross_links.label_en: Bottleneck Radar — HBM is the binding constraint (1.72M B200-eq/qtr); this is the company that owns it
cross_links.label_zh: 瓶頸雷達 — HBM 是綁定約束（每季 172 萬顆 B200 當量）；這就是擁有它的公司

cross_links.label_en: Rack BOM Radar — the HBM stacks per rack that SK hynix supplies
cross_links.label_zh: 機櫃 BOM 雷達 — SK海力士供應的每櫃 HBM 用量

cross_links.label_en: Geo second-chain — CXMT, the China catch-up threat in the HBM link
cross_links.label_zh: 地緣第二供應鏈 — CXMT，HBM 環節的中國追趕威脅

cross_links.label_en: Pricing Power Radar — the memory premium inside the same price stack
cross_links.label_zh: 議價能力雷達 — 同一價格堆疊內的記憶體溢價

cross_links.label_en: NVIDIA lens — the anchor customer whose accelerators consume these stacks
cross_links.label_zh: NVIDIA 鏡頭 — 消耗這些堆疊的錨定客戶

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: HBM4 ramps on schedule at its ~50-60% premium, SK hynix holds ≥50% HBM share, 2027 capacity re-sells out under LTAs, and conventional-DRAM contract prices stay elevated — realized $/GB keeps climbing through 2027.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: HBM4 以約 50-60% 溢價如期放量，SK海力士守住 ≥50% HBM 市占，2027 產能在 LTA 下再度售罄，傳統 DRAM 合約價維持高檔 — 已實現 $/GB 一路漲到 2027。

scenarios_seed.name_zh: 客製 base die 再定價勝出
scenarios_seed.trigger_en: Value migrates into co-designed HBM4 base dies on TSMC logic: custom-HBM design wins convert commodity stacks into socketed parts, lifting per-stack value capture even if commodity DRAM pricing cools.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 價值移進與客戶共同設計、走台積電邏輯製程的 HBM4 base die：客製 HBM 設計勝出把商品堆疊變成插槽化零件，即使商品 DRAM 價格降溫，每堆疊價值捕獲仍上升。

scenarios_seed.trigger_en: TSMC CoWoS and SK hynix HBM cap each other: whichever ramps slower sets deliverable compute (per /bottleneck's Liebig minimum), demand stays unmet, and both sides hold pricing — volume, not price, is the constraint.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 台積電 CoWoS 與 SK海力士 HBM 互為上限：誰爬坡慢誰決定可交付算力（照 /bottleneck 的 Liebig 最小值），需求持續未被滿足、雙方都守住價格 — 約束在量、不在價。

scenarios_seed.name_zh: 記憶體下行循環／對手追趕
scenarios_seed.trigger_en: Samsung requalifies HBM4 at scale and Micron ramps while CXMT floods conventional DRAM; AI capex digests, HBM premiums compress toward commodity economics, and the sold-out lever fails to renew for 2027.
scenarios_seed.trigger_zh: 三星大規模通過 HBM4 重新驗證、美光放量，同時 CXMT 淹沒傳統 DRAM；AI capex 進入消化期，HBM 溢價向商品經濟學壓縮，「售罄」槓桿在 2027 年續不上。

falsification_seed.en: A major accelerator vendor (NVIDIA or AMD) qualifies a rival's HBM4 as lead source and SK hynix share drops below ~40% — allocation power and the LTA lever break.
falsification_seed.zh: 某主要加速器廠（NVIDIA 或 AMD）把對手的 HBM4 認證為主力來源，SK海力士市占跌破約 40% — 配額權力與 LTA 槓桿破裂。

falsification_seed.en: HBM4 lands WITHOUT the reported ~50-60% premium (pricing concessions to hold share) — the generational-ASP ladder, the top lever, fails its first test.
falsification_seed.zh: HBM4 上市卻沒有報導中約 50-60% 的溢價（為守市占讓價）— 世代 ASP 階梯這個頭號槓桿在第一關就失效。

falsification_seed.en: Server-DRAM contract prices roll over for two straight quarters while HBM capacity additions outrun accelerator demand — the supercycle reverses into a classic memory down-cycle.
falsification_seed.zh: 伺服器 DRAM 合約價連兩季回落，同時 HBM 產能增加超過加速器需求 — 超級循環反轉為典型的記憶體下行循環。

watch_seed.en: DRAM contract & spot price indices (server DDR5) — the earliest mover
watch_seed.zh: DRAM 合約與現貨價指數（伺服器 DDR5）— 最早變動的訊號

watch_seed.en: HBM4 ramp: premium realization vs the reported ~50-60% (TrendForce-class)
watch_seed.zh: HBM4 放量：溢價實現 vs 報導的約 50-60%（TrendForce 級）

watch_seed.en: Sold-out / LTA language and 2027 capacity negotiations on earnings calls
watch_seed.zh: 法說會上的「售罄」／LTA 措辭與 2027 產能談判

watch_seed.en: Samsung / Micron HBM4 qualification news at NVIDIA/AMD
watch_seed.zh: 三星／美光 HBM4 在 NVIDIA/AMD 的驗證新聞

watch_seed.en: CXMT capacity & node progress — the /geo China-DRAM thread
watch_seed.zh: CXMT 產能與節點進展 — /geo 的中國 DRAM 線

watch_seed.en: M15X / Yongin ramp milestones — how fast the HBM ceiling (the platform's binding constraint) lifts
watch_seed.zh: M15X／龍仁爬坡里程碑 — HBM 天花板（平台綁定約束）抬升多快

watch_seed.en: TSMC CoWoS capacity commentary — the complement that gates HBM monetization
watch_seed.zh: 台積電 CoWoS 產能評論 — 把關 HBM 變現的互補環節

blind_spots_en: SK hynix reports NO HBM segment line — the ~$25B headline is DERIVED from total revenue × DRAM share × HBM-share-of-DRAM commentary; each ratio moves quarter to quarter.
HBM market share (~50-60%) and the HBM4 price premium (~50-60%) are third-party / press estimates — no vendor discloses either.

The ~15% TSMC-exposure figure is an ESTIMATE of the TSMC-fabbed share of AI-relevant silicon value (HBM4 base die + interposer linkage), not a disclosed number; base-die node attribution is announced-class, not confirmed at part level.
LTA prepayment/take-or-pay structures are press-reported (T3); actual contract terms are confidential.
KRW→USD conversion (~₩1,400/USD) moves the dollar run-rate; live 000660.KS / NVDA / MU proxies are sentiment context, kept out of the pricing-power score.
blind_spots_zh: SK海力士沒有 HBM 分部揭露項 — ~$25B 頭條是由總營收 × DRAM 占比 × HBM 占 DRAM 比例的評論「推導」而來；每個比例逐季變動。
HBM 市占（約 50-60%）與 HBM4 溢價（約 50-60%）皆為第三方／媒體估計 — 沒有任何廠商揭露。
台積電曝險約 15% 為對 AI 相關矽價值中台積電製造占比的估計（HBM4 base die＋中介層連結），非揭露數字；base die 節點歸因為公告級、未在零件層級確認。
LTA 預付／take-or-pay 結構為媒體報導（T3）；實際合約條款屬機密。
韓元→美元換算（約 ₩1,400/USD）會移動美元年化；即時 000660.KS／NVDA／MU proxy 為情緒情境，排除在定價權分數之外。
